title: Disable and Enable

sources.reason: Lifecycle fact source for integrity rechecks.

riskAssessment.reason: Disable must preserve runtime, policy, evidence, archive, and managed CI regions; enable must revalidate facts.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the complete serial remediation plan, including governance changes.

preReviewWarnings: Disable preserves all evidence and managed regions; enable is fail-closed until integrity and readiness checks pass.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Disable records evidence, sets disabled state, and preserves Runtime, Policy, Evidence, Archive, Update, and Uninstall capabilities.
Enable rechecks Runtime Integrity, Manifest, Project Profile, Policy, and Adoption Readiness before active state.
Repeated operations and failed enable checks are deterministic and fail closed without deleting CI managed regions.
Focused tests and lifecycle documentation describe state transitions and preservation.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Temporary suspension must not become an untracked uninstall or remove evidence and managed CI policy.
constraints: Disable is state/evidence only; it never deletes Runtime, Policy, Archive, or managed regions.
Enable requires every integrity and readiness signal to pass.
Repeated disable/enable operations are idempotent and fail closed.
intent.rationale: Explicit state transitions keep temporary suspension reversible and auditable.

rawUserRequest: 走完当前文档的流程；按计划逐个工单执行完整生命周期，包括 PR、合并、清理分支，直到全部工单完成。用户已授权所需确认范围。

declaredIntent.summary: Implement disable and enable lifecycle state transitions with evidence preservation and readiness gating.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Disable preserves runtime, evidence, policy, archive, and managed regions.
Enable fails closed when any readiness check fails.
Enable restores active state only after all checks pass.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete serial remediation plan, including governance policy changes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
